nodes.context: Japan's largest yakuza gang, led by a godfather, with a wakagashira (second-in-command).
Sub-organization of Yamaguchi-gumi, headed by Masaru Takumi, with about 1000 members.
Breakaway affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi that assassinated Masaru Takumi.

edges.evidence_quote: he also headed his own sub-organization, the 1000-member Takumi-gumi
edges.context: Takumi-gumi is a sub-organization of Yamaguchi-gumi.

edges.evidence_quote: members of a breakaway Yamaguchi affiliate, the Nakano-kai
edges.context: Nakano-kai is a breakaway affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi.

edges.evidence_quote: Takumi was shot and killed in a coffee shop ... by members of a breakaway Yamaguchi affiliate, the Nakano-kai
edges.context: Nakano-kai assassinated the head of Takumi-gumi, indicating conflict.
